chapter_title.ar: بَابُ مَا يُسْتَحَبُّ أَنْ يُفْطَرَ عَلَيْهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 66 – What is recommended for one to break a Fast upon it

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/373)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/373)
text: الْإِفْطَارُ عَلَى الْمَاءِ يَغْسِلُ الذُّنُوبَ مِنَ الْقَلْبِ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Salih Bin Sindy, from Ibn Sinan, from a man,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Breaking a Fast upon the water washes the sins from the ‘Qalb’ (heart)’.
en.sarwar: 3. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Salih ibn Sindiy from ibn Sinan from a man who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that one should use just water for breakfast, after sunset; it washes off sins from the heart.”
